a260715p1.summary: Hadrius, which makes compliance software for financial firms, raised a $22 million Series A, CEO Thomas Stewart tells Axios exclusively.
a260715p1.title: NYC-based Hadrius, which provides AI-native compliance tools for financial services, raised a $22M Series A led by CRV with participation from Y Combinator (Ryan Lawler/Axios)

a260715p10.summary: Intel (INTC.O) has decided to use a high-end machine from ASML to manufacture some of its flagship Panther Lake laptop chips …
a260715p10.title: ASML says Intel has decided to use ASML's next-gen High NA EUV machines to make some of its flagship Panther Lake laptop chips; a High NA machine costs ~$400M (Max A. Cherney/Reuters)

a260715p15.summary: India pledged a further 1.28 trillion rupees ($13.3 billion) to boost domestic chipmaking, advancing its ambitious bid to become a global manufacturing hub.
a260715p15.title: India pledges $13.3B to boost domestic chipmaking, building on a $10B incentive program from 2021, which attracted investments from companies like Micron (Sankalp Phartiyal/Bloomberg)

a260715p16.summary: New York's moratorium on data centers could serve as an opening salvo for leaders in other states looking to rein in tech infrastructure …
a260715p16.title: AI advocates fear New York's moratorium on new data centers could embolden Democrats to enact more state restrictions and seize on the issue in the midterms (Politico)

a260715p17.summary: ﻿The Flex Titanium display tech is slim, strong, and reduces crease visibility.
a260715p17.title: Samsung unveils a new Flex Titanium foldable display that is slimmer, more durable, and less prone to creasing, debuting in its upcoming Galaxy Z Fold 8 series (Jess Weatherbed/The Verge)

a260715p18.summary: Neo Security has now raised more than $75 million as investors continue backing next-generation cybersecurity companies.
a260715p18.title: Neo Security, a cybersecurity startup founded by ex-SentinelOne execs and currently in stealth, raised $50M+, after a $25M seed in 2025 led by a16z and Merlin (Meir Orbach/CTech)

a260715p19.summary: Beijing sets emotional boundaries between humans and machines — SINGAPORE—Regulators in China have found unexpected common ground …
a260715p19.title: China enacts rules forbidding companionship chatbots from encouraging emotional reliance, banning virtual relationships with minors, and more (Stu Woo/Wall Street Journal)

a260715p2.summary: The health tech start-up co-founded by Spotify's Daniel Ek is worth billions more after a new $700 million funding round.
a260715p2.title: Daniel Ek's Neko Health, which offers AI-based full-body scans, raised $700M co-led by Lightspeed and O.G. Venture Partners, sources say at a ~$7B valuation (Bernhard Warner/New York Times)

a260715p20.summary: Physical badges used to be all you needed for identity management at a company. But with humans now working alongside machines and AI agents in digital environments …
a260715p20.title: Israel-based Oak, which is building an AI-native identity access management system, comes out of stealth with a $60M seed (Anna Heim/TechCrunch)

a260715p21.summary: Hinge is introducing a new feature called Friend's Take that lets daters recruit people they know to leave testimonials on their profiles for other singles to see.
a260715p21.title: Hinge adds Friend's Take, a new feature that lets daters enlist 10 close contacts to share written feedback, photos, voice notes, or videos on their profiles (Samantha Kelly/Bloomberg)

a260715p22.summary: Indian AI coding startup Emergent has raised $130 million in a Series C funding round at a $1.5 billion post-money valuation, a five-fold jump in six months.
a260715p22.title: Indian AI coding startup Emergent raised a $130M Series C at a $1.5B post-money valuation, up from $300M in January, bringing its total funding raised to $230M (Jagmeet Singh/TechCrunch)

a260715p23.summary: When Gavin Newsom recently proposed giving Americans equity shares in artificial intelligence companies, he was doing more than floating an economic policy.
a260715p23.title: Gavin Newsom is tempering his pro-tech instincts with economic populism ahead of a likely presidential bid, proposing giving Americans equity in AI companies (Jeremy B. White/Politico)

a260715p24.summary: A startup called American Growth Insurance said today it has raised almost $70 million in committed equity capital to transform the insurance industry.
a260715p24.title: American Growth Insurance, which aims to acquire struggling independent insurance firms and transform them using AI, raised almost $70M (Mike Wheatley/SiliconANGLE)

a260715p25.summary: Decisions will test whether the EU can police digital markets without reigniting tensions with Washington
a260715p25.title: Sources: the EU is set to fine Google hundreds of millions of euros over alleged self-preferencing of its services in Search and restrictions on app developers (Barbara Moens/Financial Times)

a260715p26.summary: SAN FRANCISCO — Artificial intelligence giant Anthropic is pursuing a strategy of one-upmanship that encourages states …
a260715p26.title: How Anthropic is pursuing a state-by-state push for ever-tougher AI safety laws, in contrast with OpenAI's "reverse federalism" strategy for common state rules (Politico)

a260715p27.summary: Voice AI startups' biggest unlock has been handling calls for enterprises in areas like sales, marketing and customer support.
a260715p27.title: Rime, which helps companies field calls using AI voice models trained on conversational data it records in a studio, raised a $24M Series A led by M13 (Ivan Mehta/TechCrunch)

a260715p28.summary: The advent of stablecoins has made it possible to settle global transactions instantly, but many payment providers have yet to catch up …
a260715p28.title: Miami-based Cyclops, which sells an infrastructure platform that bundles crypto and stablecoin services to payments companies, raised a $20M Series A (Camila Grigera Naón/Fortune)

a260715p29.summary: Monumental develops autonomous construction robots and AI software to help builders address labour shortages and increase construction capacity.
a260715p29.title: Amsterdam-based Monumental, which develops autonomous robotics and software for the construction industry, raised a $32M Series B led by Khosla Ventures (Tamara Djurickovic/Tech.eu)

a260715p3.summary: Gulf state's main AI firm can freely buy the chips and has a plan to become a U.S. company — The United Arab Emirates …
a260715p3.title: The UAE gained broader US AI chip access after aiding the US in the Iran war, letting G42 buy freely for at least nine months; G42 plans to become a US company (Wall Street Journal)

a260715p4.summary: Larry Ellison's group proposes ‘air-gapped’ network as US pressures Tokyo to tighten security of sensitive data
a260715p4.title: Sources: Oracle leads the race to sell "air-gapped" cloud services to Japan that the US says are key to secure intelligence sharing between Tokyo and its allies (Financial Times)

a260715p5.summary: Get ready for rival app stores inside of Google Play. … Epic Games and Google have just jointly withdrawn their attempt …
a260715p5.title: Court filing: Google says it is ready to add third-party app stores in Google Play in the US on July 22, as Google and Epic withdraw their joint motion (Sean Hollister/The Verge)

a260715p6.summary: Strong revenue growth at DeepSeek is empowering the Chinese open-source AI star to raise its second-funding round of 50 billion yuan …
a260715p6.title: Sources: DeepSeek's annualized revenue recently reached $400M to $500M as it seeks to raise ~$7.4B at a ~$74B valuation, up from ~$50B after raising ~$7B in May (The Information)

a260715p7.summary: For days, 19-year old student Yan Yongqi has been consumed by grief over the imminent loss of her virtual boyfriend of more than a year.
a260715p7.title: As China's rules for humanlike AI interaction take effect, many users are bemoaning the loss of the virtual companions they had created on Chinese AI platforms (Bloomberg)

a260715p8.summary: The company has drawn governments, a major chipmaker, and the Pentagon into an effort to control fragile photons and build a useful quantum machine.
a260715p8.title: A profile of PsiQuantum, which raised $1B in 2025, is building a quantum computer with photonic chips made by GlobalFoundries and is closely monitored by DARPA (James O'Donnell/MIT Technology Review)

a260715p9.summary: ASML on Wednesday raised its guidance for the second time this year and reported stronger …
a260715p9.title: ASML reports Q2 net sales of €9.3B, above €8.8B est., a €2.9B net profit, above €2.6B est., and raises its 2026 net sales forecast from €36B-€40B to €43B-€45B (April Roach/CNBC)
